creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Reed,

unfortunately, there hasn't been any new reply to your problem report for
the sysutils/modules port (see [1]), yet. Would you like to give updating
the port yourself a try, maybe, and post a patch for the update as a
followup to this PR?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170186
